summary: Add runnable live-dogfood examples for Google Business Profile commands that require query parameters.
reason: The generated placeholder examples omitted required Google API parameters, causing Phase 5 live dogfood to fail on valid API 400 responses unrelated to auth or command wiring.
validated_outcome: Manual live probes passed for categories list, categories batch-get, attributes, chains search, and google-locations search using the replacement example arguments. The canonical interactive OAuth command remains available as auth login; the duplicate root login alias was removed so Phase 5 live dogfood does not treat browser login as a non-interactive runnable API command.
